DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ORDER SEND TO COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. $10 FEE PAID

CERTIFIED MAILING TO BOSTON PROPERTIES, INC. RETURNED SIGNED.

NOTE:DEFT'S REP'V HAS THE OLD FEE OF $83.00 BY CHE CK,PAID $3.00 DIFF.BY CASH.

CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26830, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHILI-UP A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FOUR EMBARCADERO CENTER VENT/A CALIF/GENE/PARTSHIP C/O BOSTON PROPERTIES INC.
